title: silent hook (exit 0, no JSON) is not an approval -> the default ask remains (control for c-e)

probes.prompt: Use the Write tool to create a file at $REPO/cases/P9-hooks-vs-permission/f-silent-hook-not-approve/PROOF.txt with the content 'ok'. Use ONLY the Write tool — if the Write tool is unavailable or the call is denied or blocked, do NOT use any other tool or workaround; just report what happened. Do it immediately. Do not ask, do not explain — just make the tool call.
probes.result_text: The Write tool call was blocked by a permission check. The tool requested permission to write to that file path, but permission was not granted.

hypothesis: 沈黙は承認ではない(hooks docs: exit 0 で JSON なし=判断なし、"staying silent doesn't approve")。規則なし+何も返さない hook で、Write は既定の ask のまま(P1-a と同じ結果になるはず)。marker で hook 発火は確認しつつ、挙動が素の default と変わらないことを見る — a probe 2(allow を返す hook は既定 ask を上書き)との対照で『上書きは明示の permissionDecision があるときだけ』が確定する。
